nasb.text: Let there be none to extend lovingkindness to him, Nor any to be gracious to his fatherless children.

esv.text: Let there be none to extend kindness to him, nor any to pity his fatherless children!

cnv.text: 願無人對他施仁慈； 願無人恩待他的孤兒。

ccb.text: 愿无人向他施恩， 无人同情他的孤儿。

csbs.text: 愿无人向他伸出慈爱的手， 无人恩待他的孤儿。
